title: Enhanced Font Size Control in monday Docs

posts.author: zacharylee0630 (zacharylee0630)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’d like to raise a feature need that is gaining strong attention from our enterprise users:

In monday Docs, while it’s currently possible to adjust font size using H1, H2, and H3 headers, our users would like more granular control — specifically, the ability to adjust the font size of individual text segments within a paragraph or block.

This enhancement is particularly important for:

  • Emphasizing key terms or instructions in internal documentation
  • Improving readability in long-form content
  • Supporting knowledge base formatting standards that align with enterprise style guides.

Given that our client is scaling monday Docs usage across departments, this limitation is becoming a point of friction and reducing adoption as a primary documentation tool.

We strongly encourage the product team to consider this as a priority feature request, as it would significantly elevate the user experience and align monday Docs with the expected flexibility of modern document editors.

Please let us know if there is a roadmap timeline or any workaround we can explore in the meantime.
